flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Great Bay Community College are 13% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($42.4k vs $48.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Great Bay Community College fell 21% between 2006 and 2009 (22.8% → 17.9%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Great Bay Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6% → 0.0%).
